summary: Tested geographic restriction system changes - CityRestrictionGate removed from App.js, region check now only happens at checkout. All 4 requested features verified: homepage opens directly, products/categories browsable, allowed-regions API working, no critical JS errors.
critical_code_review_comments: CityRestrictionGate correctly commented out in App.js (line 29)
regionService.js properly implements checkRegionAllowed() with caching
RegionBlockedModal.js has proper data-testid attributes for testing
CheckoutPage.js, FoodCartPage.js, FoodBatchCheckoutPage.js all correctly call checkRegionAllowed() before order submission
context_for_next_testing_agent: Geographic restriction system changed from blocking at app entry to checking only at checkout. CityRestrictionGate is commented out in App.js. Region check happens in CheckoutPage, FoodCartPage, and FoodBatchCheckoutPage using regionService.js. Currently only Aleppo (حلب) with 25 regions is allowed.

features_verified.homepage_opens_directly: PASS - No city selection screen blocking the homepage
features_verified.allowed_regions_api_working: PASS - Returns enabled=true, Aleppo with 25 regions
features_verified.no_critical_js_errors: PASS - Only expected 401 errors from unauthenticated VOIP polling
